summary: Frontend-only testing of 6 bug fixes: sticky tab bar, FAB positioning, duplicate profile icon removal, List Options sheet, clear list actions, swipe-to-delete/edit, and Edit Item modal via long press.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: Animated useNativeDriver not supported in web preview. This is expected for web/Expo preview and not a production issue.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 issues are resolved. Tab bar is sticky (flow-based via Expo Tabs tabBar prop). FAB at bottom:20 right:20 inside SafeAreaView - does not overlap tab bar. Header has only ellipsis (...) button. List Options sheet has Clear checked items and Clear entire list - both work without touching History. Swipe hint visible. Long press opens Edit modal pre-populated. All 4 tabs navigate correctly. Swipe gestures (left=delete, right=edit) are implemented in code via react-native-gesture-handler Swipeable but cannot be fully verified via Playwright web simulation.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all issues were already fixed by E1 before this testing run.
